findings.class: bg-brown-600 text-cream-50 px-6 py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold hover:bg-brown-700 transition
rounded-lg bg-gold-500 px-4 py-2 font-semibold text-cream-50 transition hover:bg-gold-600 flex items-center gap-2

text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium ${
                        loan.status === "active"
                          ? "bg-success-light text-success-dark"
                          : loan.status === "repaid"
                          ? "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800"
                          : loan.status === "liquidated"
                          ? "bg-error-light text-error-dark"
                          : "bg-brown-100 text-brown-700"
                      }
rounded-lg bg-brown-600 px-4 py-2 text-cream-50 transition hover:bg-brown-700
ml-3 rounded-lg bg-gold-600 px-4 py-2 text-cream-50 transition hover:bg-gold-700
w-full text-left px-4 py-3 text-brown-700 hover:bg-brown-50 rounded-t-lg transition
block px-4 py-3 text-brown-700 hover:bg-brown-50 rounded-b-lg transition
bg-brown-600 text-cream-50 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 opacity-90
bg-gold-600 text-cream-50 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 opacity-90
flex-1 px-4 py-2 text-brown-600 dark:text-brown-300 border border-brown-300 dark:border-brown-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-brown-50 dark:hover:bg-brown-700 transition
flex-1 px-4 py-2 bg-brown-600 text-cream-50 rounded-lg hover:bg-brown-700 transition
